title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 22
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a present for Dad.
questions.audio_script: Woman: I still need a present for Dad. I thought about buying a tie, but that didn't seem special. || Boy: What about a watch? You mentioned that last week. || Woman: I checked, but the shop only had expensive ones. In the end, [1]I bought a cookbook because he wants to make new dinners[/1]. || Boy: That sounds perfect. Useful presents are often better than decorations. || Woman: I hope so. I’ll wrap it tonight after dinner, and take it over tomorrow. || Woman: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I still need a present for Dad. I thought about buying a tie, but that didn't seem special.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: What about a watch? You mentioned that last week.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I checked, but the shop only had expensive ones. In the end, I bought a cookbook because he wants to make new dinners.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That sounds perfect. Useful presents are often better than decorations.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I hope so. I’ll wrap it tonight after dinner, and take it over tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.question: What did the speaker buy for Dad?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, tie on a hanger, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, cookbook open beside cooking pans, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, watch in a gift box, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says they bought a cookbook because he wants to make new dinners.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the sports centre.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the sports centre on Saturday? || Girl: I was going to walk, but it is too far with my kit. || Man: What about the taxi? || Girl: True, but it costs too much. Mum can take me later, but [1]I’m going to take the bus because it stops right outside the entrance[/1]. || Man: Good idea. I’ll meet you by the main entrance at ten, so we can go in together. Don’t forget your ticket. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.text: How are you getting to the sports centre on Saturday?

dialogue.text: I was going to walk, but it is too far with my kit.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about the taxi?

dialogue.speaker: girl

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good idea. I’ll meet you by the main entrance at ten, so we can go in together. Don’t forget your ticket.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a work shift at a sports shop.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are you working at the sports shop this weekend? || Man: Yes, but not on Friday afternoon as usual. The manager changed the rota because Dan has a hospital appointment. || Woman: So when are you going in? || Man: I can’t do Saturday evening, and Saturday lunch is already covered, so [1]I’m doing the Saturday morning shift[/1]. || Woman: That’s not too bad. You’ll still have some free time later. || Man: Exactly. I can finish my homework then. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you working at the sports shop this weekend?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but not on Friday afternoon as usual. The manager changed the rota because Dan has a hospital appointment.

dialogue.speaker: man

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That’s not too bad. You’ll still have some free time later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly. I can finish my homework then.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a holiday park.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What did you do at the holiday park? I thought you were trying horse riding. || Man: We planned to, but the horses were resting. || Woman: Did you try cycling? || Man: No, because all the bikes were booked. In the end, [1]we spent the afternoon doing archery[/1]. It was more fun than I expected. || Woman: Maybe I’ll go next time. || Man: You should. They lend you everything you need, and the staff are friendly. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.text: Maybe I’ll go next time.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost phone.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you found your phone yet? I know you were worried about it this morning. || Woman: Not really. I checked the library, because I was sure I had it there after printing my homework. || Man: And what about the supermarket? You went there afterwards, didn't you? || Woman: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then the receptionist called and said [1]my phone was on the desk at the youth club[/1]. I’m going to pick it up before it closes. || Man: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you found your phone yet? I know you were worried about it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Not really. I checked the library, because I was sure I had it there after printing my homework.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: And what about the supermarket? You went there afterwards, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then the receptionist called and said my phone was on the desk at the youth club. I’m going to pick it up before it closes.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a school picnic.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Are you ready for the school picnic tomorrow? I was going to pack my shorts, because it looked very hot. || Girl: I saw the latest message from school. The main problem is the grass will be wet. || Boy: Should I take my umbrella? || Girl: Not really. [1]The teacher said everyone should bring comfortable trainers[/1], because they will walk across muddy fields. || Boy: Thanks. I’ll put that in my bag now, before I forget again. My bag is by the door already. || Boy: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.text: Are you ready for the school picnic tomorrow? I was going to pack my shorts, because it looked very hot.

dialogue.text: Should I take my umbrella?

dialogue.speaker: girl

dialogue.speaker: boy

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear a teacher giving information about the chess club.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Before you go, remember that the chess club is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the music room, but the piano lesson is still happening. Others may wait near the canteen, although the tables are needed for lunch. [1]Please go straight to the science lab at four o'clock[/1]. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Before you go, remember that the chess club is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the music room, but the piano lesson is still happening. Others may wait near the canteen, although the tables are needed for lunch. Please go straight to the science lab at four o'clock. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there.

questions.question: Where will the chess club be?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students in a music room, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students sitting in a canteen, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The teacher says to go straight to the science lab.
